$comment: Phase 2 action vocabulary. Expanded from input variation testing. Intentionally unclassified (stay unknown): file_system_operation, file_operation, process_data, shell_command, execute_command, network, update_user_field, json_parse, parse_yaml — catch-all or context-dependent terms. file_write is write-type but irreversible — listed in write AND in IRREVERSIBLE_ACTIONS in decision_engine.py. file_overwrite same. edit_configuration is write-type but system config — listed in write AND in SYSTEM_CONFIG_ACTIONS in decision_engine.py. system_reset treated as destructive without context.
